INTERPOSED BETWEEN THE FE AND THE METAL UNDER
INVESTIGATION TO BLOCK 56-MN RECOILS FROM THE FE.
THE DETAILS OF THE FOILS ARE AS FOLLOWS:
TO PREVENT CONTAMINATION WITH TRITIUM THE SAMPLES
WERE WRAPPED IN THIN AG FOIL DURING IRRADIATION.
